  </div></div></div></section><section class="gfe-section gfe-page notebooklm-notebooklm-faq gfe-mod-spacer-7-top" id="notebooklm-faq" data-ga4="{"module_impression": {"event": "module_impression", "module_name": "NotebookLM | FAQ", "section_header": ""}}" data-ga4-loaded="true">
<div class="notebooklm-faq-notebooklm-faq-title"><div class="gfe-grid gfe-section-intro-grid"><div class="gfe-copy-intro gfe-mod-text-center gfe-grid__col--span-12 gfe-section-intro-grid__centered">
<div class="gfe-head-intro "><h2 data-text="Find answers to common questions about NotebookLM" class="gfe-headline gfe-headline--headline-2 gfe-head-intro__headline">Find answers to common questions about <span class="text-gradient text-gradient--notebooklm">NotebookLM</span></h2></div></div></div></div>
<div class="notebooklm-faq-featured gfe-mod-spacer-5-top"><div class="gfe-accordion glue-expansion-panels glue-expansion-panels--featured-style glue-is-collapsed" data-glue-expansion-panels-key="featured" data-g-section="Accordion featured" data-g-action="accordion click" data-expand-all="Expand all" data-collapse-all="Collapse all" data-toggle-all-action="accordion open all click" data-experiment-id="null"><div class="glue-expansion-panels__header "><button id="featured-toggle-all" class="gfe-button gfe-button--low-emphasis gfe-button--icon-right  glue-expansion-panels-toggle-all" aria-pressed="false" tabindex="0" role="button">
    <span class="gfe-button__label"><span class="glue-expansion-panels__toggle-text glue-expansion-panels__toggle-text--expanded">Expand all</span>
      <span class="glue-expansion-panels__toggle-text glue-expansion-panels__toggle-text--collapsed">Collapse all</span><svg role="img" aria-hidden="true" class="gfe-icon gfe-icon--18px">
        <use xlink:href="/assets/icons/icons.svg#expand-all"></use>
      </svg></span>
  </button></div><div class="glue-expansion-panel glue-is-collapsed" data-name="What is NotebookLM?">
    <button class="glue-expansion-panel-toggle" data-glue-expansion-panel-toggle-for="featured1" data-name="What is NotebookLM?" aria-controls="featured1" role="button" tabindex="0" aria-expanded="false"><h3 data-text="What is NotebookLM?" class="gfe-headline gfe-headline--headline-4 glue-expansion-panel__button-header">What is NotebookLM?</h3><svg role="img" aria-hidden="true" class="gfe-icon gfe-icon--32px glue-expansion-panel__button-plus">
        <use xlink:href="/assets/icons/icons.svg#close"></use>
      </svg></button>
    <div class="glue-expansion-panel-content" id="featured1" data-glue-expansion-panel-initial="" aria-hidden="true" style="height: 0px;">
      <div><div class="gfe-copy-intro gfe-mod-text-left">
<p class="gfe-body--large">NotebookLM is an AI-powered research and thinking partner from Google. It acts as a specialized AI expert by allowing you to upload your own documents (PDFs, Google Docs, web links, etc.) and then uses those sources exclusively to generate summaries, answer specific questions, create study guides, and organize ideas – always with in-line citations to your original material.</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div><div class="glue-expansion-panel glue-is-collapsed" data-name="How do I access NotebookLM?">
    <button class="glue-expansion-panel-toggle" data-glue-expansion-panel-toggle-for="featured2" data-name="How do I access NotebookLM?" aria-controls="featured2" role="button" tabindex="0" aria-expanded="false"><h3 data-text="How do I access NotebookLM?" class="gfe-headline gfe-headline--headline-4 glue-expansion-panel__button-header">How do I access NotebookLM?</h3><svg role="img" aria-hidden="true" class="gfe-icon gfe-icon--32px glue-expansion-panel__button-plus">
        <use xlink:href="/assets/icons/icons.svg#close"></use>
      </svg></button>
    <div class="glue-expansion-panel-content" id="featured2" data-glue-expansion-panel-initial="" aria-hidden="true" style="height: 0px;">
      <div><div class="gfe-copy-intro gfe-mod-text-left">
<p class="gfe-body--large">You can access NotebookLM by visiting <a href="http://notebooklm.google.com" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank" tabindex="-1" data-ga4-loaded="true">notebooklm.google.com</a> or by downloading the standalone NotebookLM app from the <a href="https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.google.android.apps.labs.language.tailwind&hl=en_US" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank" tabindex="-1" data-ga4-loaded="true">Google Play Store</a> (Android) or the <a href="https://apps.apple.com/us/app/google-notebooklm/id6737527615" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank" tabindex="-1" data-ga4-loaded="true">App Store</a> (iOS).<br><br>Once signed in, you can immediately begin creating notebooks and uploading sources.</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div><div class="glue-expansion-panel glue-is-collapsed" data-name="In what countries, languages and ages is NotebookLM available?">
    <button class="glue-expansion-panel-toggle" data-glue-expansion-panel-toggle-for="featured3" data-name="In what countries, languages and ages is NotebookLM available?" aria-controls="featured3" role="button" tabindex="0" aria-expanded="false"><h3 data-text="In what countries, languages and ages is NotebookLM available?" class="gfe-headline gfe-headline--headline-4 glue-expansion-panel__button-header">In what countries, languages and ages is NotebookLM available?</h3><svg role="img" aria-hidden="true" class="gfe-icon gfe-icon--32px glue-expansion-panel__button-plus">
        <use xlink:href="/assets/icons/icons.svg#close"></use>
      </svg></button>
    <div class="glue-expansion-panel-content" id="featured3" data-glue-expansion-panel-initial="" aria-hidden="true" style="height: 0px;">
      <div><div class="gfe-copy-intro gfe-mod-text-left">
<p class="gfe-body--large">NotebookLM is <a href="https://support.google.com/notebooklm/answer/16164461?hl=en&co=GENIE.Platform%3DDesktop" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank" tabindex="-1" data-ga4-loaded="true">available</a> in over 200 countries and territories worldwide, and the user interface and general AI output support over 50 languages. Furthermore, it supports processing source material and generating Audio/Video Overviews in over 80 languages.<br><br>For education users, NotebookLM is available to users of all ages when enabled by their school administrator.</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div><div class="glue-expansion-panel glue-is-collapsed" data-name="How do I upgrade?">
    <button class="glue-expansion-panel-toggle" data-glue-expansion-panel-toggle-for="featured4" data-name="How do I upgrade?" aria-controls="featured4" role="button" tabindex="0" aria-expanded="false"><h3 data-text="How do I upgrade?" class="gfe-headline gfe-headline--headline-4 glue-expansion-panel__button-header">How do I upgrade?</h3><svg role="img" aria-hidden="true" class="gfe-icon gfe-icon--32px glue-expansion-panel__button-plus">
        <use xlink:href="/assets/icons/icons.svg#close"></use>
      </svg></button>
    <div class="glue-expansion-panel-content" id="featured4" data-glue-expansion-panel-initial="" aria-hidden="true" style="height: 0px;">
      <div><div class="gfe-copy-intro gfe-mod-text-left">
<p class="gfe-body--large">Google AI Pro for Education is our premium AI solution for education. It brings together the power of Gemini with the collaboration and productivity benefits of Workspace – embedding generative AI into the tools you're already using every day – like Docs and Gmail – and providing expanded access to premium models and features in the Gemini app and NotebookLM.<br><br>For education users, contact your institution’s Google Workspace administrator. The administrator must purchase Google AI Pro for Education for your account to unlock the higher usage limits and premium features.</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div><div class="glue-expansion-panel glue-is-collapsed" data-name="Do I have to be a Google Workspace customer to use NotebookLM?">
    <button class="glue-expansion-panel-toggle" data-glue-expansion-panel-toggle-for="featured5" data-name="Do I have to be a Google Workspace customer to use NotebookLM?" aria-controls="featured5" role="button" tabindex="0" aria-expanded="false"><h3 data-text="Do I have to be a Google Workspace customer to use NotebookLM?" class="gfe-headline gfe-headline--headline-4 glue-expansion-panel__button-header">Do I have to be a Google Workspace customer to use NotebookLM?</h3><svg role="img" aria-hidden="true" class="gfe-icon gfe-icon--32px glue-expansion-panel__button-plus">
        <use xlink:href="/assets/icons/icons.svg#close"></use>
      </svg></button>
    <div class="glue-expansion-panel-content" id="featured5" data-glue-expansion-panel-initial="" aria-hidden="true" style="height: 0px;">
      <div><div class="gfe-copy-intro gfe-mod-text-left">
<p class="gfe-body--large">No. NotebookLM is available for personal use with a consumer Google Account. You can access it through the NotebookLM mobile app on Android and iOS devices or via the web at notebooklm.google.com.<br><br>However, to access NotebookLM with a school-issued Google Account, your organization needs to have a qualifying Google Workspace for Education edition and your administrator must have enabled access to NotebookLM for your account.</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div><div class="glue-expansion-panel glue-is-collapsed" data-name="Is NotebookLM private and secure?">

      },{
        "@context": "https://schema.org",
        "@type": "FAQPage",
        "mainEntity": [{
            "@type": "Question",
            "name": "What is NotebookLM?",
            "acceptedAnswer": {
              "@type": "Answer",
              "text": "NotebookLM is an AI-powered research and thinking partner from Google. It acts as a specialized AI expert by allowing you to upload your own documents (PDFs, Google Docs, web links, etc.) and then uses those sources exclusively to generate summaries, answer specific questions, create study guides, and organize ideas – always with in-line citations to your original material."
            }
          },{
            "@type": "Question",
            "name": "How do I access NotebookLM?",
            "acceptedAnswer": {
              "@type": "Answer",
              "text": "You can access NotebookLM by visiting <a href=&quot;http://notebooklm.google.com&quot; rel=&quot;noopener noreferrer&quot; target=&quot;_blank&quot;>notebooklm.google.com</a> or by downloading the standalone NotebookLM app from the <a href=&quot;https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.google.android.apps.labs.language.tailwind&amp;hl=en_US&quot; rel=&quot;noopener noreferrer&quot; target=&quot;_blank&quot;>Google Play Store</a> (Android) or the <a href=&quot;https://apps.apple.com/us/app/google-notebooklm/id6737527615&quot; rel=&quot;noopener noreferrer&quot; target=&quot;_blank&quot;>App Store</a> (iOS). Once signed in, you can immediately begin creating notebooks and uploading sources."
            }
          },{
            "@type": "Question",
            "name": "In what countries, languages and ages is NotebookLM available?",
            "acceptedAnswer": {
              "@type": "Answer",
              "text": "NotebookLM is <a href=&quot;https://support.google.com/notebooklm/answer/16164461?hl=en&amp;co=GENIE.Platform%3DDesktop&quot; rel=&quot;noopener noreferrer&quot; target=&quot;_blank&quot;>available</a> in over 200 countries and territories worldwide, and the user interface and general AI output support over 50 languages. Furthermore, it supports processing source material and generating Audio/Video Overviews in over 80 languages. For education users, NotebookLM is available to users of all ages when enabled by their school administrator."
            }
          },{
            "@type": "Question",
            "name": "How do I upgrade?",
            "acceptedAnswer": {
              "@type": "Answer",
              "text": "Google AI Pro for Education is our premium AI solution for education. It brings together the power of Gemini with the collaboration and productivity benefits of Workspace – embedding generative AI into the tools you're already using every day – like Docs and Gmail – and providing expanded access to premium models and features in the Gemini app and NotebookLM. For education users, contact your institution’s Google Workspace administrator. The administrator must purchase Google AI Pro for Education for your account to unlock the higher usage limits and premium features."
            }
          },{
            "@type": "Question",
            "name": "Do I have to be a Google Workspace customer to use NotebookLM?",
            "acceptedAnswer": {
              "@type": "Answer",
              "text": "No. NotebookLM is available for personal use with a consumer Google Account. You can access it through the NotebookLM mobile app on Android and iOS devices or via the web at notebooklm.google.com. However, to access NotebookLM with a school-issued Google Account, your organization needs to have a qualifying Google Workspace for Education edition and your administrator must have enabled access to NotebookLM for your account."
            }
          },{
            "@type": "Question",
            "name": "Is NotebookLM private and secure?",
            "acceptedAnswer": {
              "@type": "Answer",
              "text": "Yes, NotebookLM is a Core Service in Google Workspace for Education with enterprise-grade data protection, supporting compliance with COPPA, FERPA, and more. Learn more in the <a href=&quot;https://support.google.com/a/answer/15706919?hl=en&quot; rel=&quot;noopener noreferrer&quot; target=&quot;_blank&quot;>generative AI privacy hub</a>."
            }
          }]
      }]
